## 48. GitHub Release Notes Template

```markdown
# Release v1.0.0 - "The Spice Must Flow"

## 🎉 First Major Release!

Dune: Spice & Sand is now available for Android! Experience the struggle for Arrakis in a book-accurate real-time strategy game.

---

## ✨ New Features

### Core Gameplay
- ✅ 3 playable factions (Atreides, Harkonnen, Fremen)
- ✅ 18 campaign missions following Dune, Book I
- ✅ Full RTS mechanics with resource management
- ✅ Book-accurate shield/lasgun physics
- ✅ Sandworm AI with vibration attraction
- ✅ Fremen worm riding system
- ✅ Atreides prescience ability
- ✅ Bene Gesserit Voice commands

### Mobile Optimization
- ✅ Touch controls with drag-select, pinch-zoom
- ✅ Performance optimized for 60 FPS on mid-range devices
- ✅ APK size <120 MB
- ✅ Android 8.0+ support

### Technical Features
- ✅ Save/load system with cloud support
- ✅ Google Play Games integration (achievements, leaderboards)
- ✅ Audio system with Dune-inspired soundtrack
- ✅ Procedural terrain generation
- ✅ Fog of war system

---

## 📱 Download

### Android
- **APK:** [Download from Releases](https://github.com/yourusername/Dune-Spice-And-Sand/releases/download/v1.0.0/Dune_Spice_And_Sand_v1.0.0.apk)
- **Size:** 118 MB
- **Requires:** Android 8.0+ (API 26)

### Source Code
- **Repository:** [GitHub](https://github.com/yourusername/Dune-Spice-And-Sand)
- **License:** MIT

---

## 🎮 Getting Started

1. Download and install APK
2. Launch game
3. Tap "Campaign"
4. Complete Mission 1 tutorial
5. Harvest spice, avoid worms, build your base!

---

## 📖 Book References

All mechanics cite specific Dune chapters:
- Spice harvesting – Dune, Book I, Chapter 3
- Shield mechanics – Dune, Book I, Chapter 5
- Worm riding – Dune, Book I, Chapter 35
- Water of Life – Dune, Book I, Chapter 36
- [See full list in README](README.md#book-references)

---

## 🐛 Known Issues

- Voice commands require button input (voice recognition coming in v1.1)
- Multiplayer not yet implemented
- Some animations placeholder
- Particle effects need optimization on older devices

---
